round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent had no evidence in R1 and none in R2; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (Botanics, Meta) to refine confidence and downgrade Russia, showing good synthesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (Landscape, Meta) to refine confidence and downgrade Russia, showing good synthesis.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent moved from no candidates to a reasoned set of candidates in R2, synthesizing landscape and meta evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence to upgrade confidence in Canada, showing good synthesis.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the lack of hard constraints (linguistic/regulatory) and relied on the consensus of the other agents. The reasoning was sound, though the text was truncated at the end. The elimination of Russia based on road quality was a strong logical step.
